message:
Restore changelog stub files accidentally overwritten

The generated changelog content was committed in d29c5857 instead of
keeping the stub placeholders. Restore the stubs so only `pnpm
sync:changelog` populates them.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -2,76 +2,6 @@
 title: Changelog
 ---
 
-import LinkCard from '@components/LinkCard.astro';
-
-Welcome to the Tenzir changelog hub. Here you can find release notes,
-feature updates, and behind-the-scenes improvements across our projects.
-
-<LinkCard
-  title="Tenzir Node"
-  description="The security data pipeline engine that collects security telemetry, normalizes events to OCSF, and offers an open data lake for storage."
-  href="/changelog/tenzir"
-  icon="seti:webpack"
-  color="blue"
-  meta="v5.22.1"
-/>
-
-<LinkCard
-  title="Tenzir Platform"
-  description="The control plane for managing Tenzir Nodes, providing a web interface for data exploration and pipeline creation, and workspace and secret management."
-  href="/changelog/platform"
-  icon="seti:db"
-  color="red"
-  meta="v1.25.1"
-/>
-
-<LinkCard
-  title="Tenzir MCP Server"
-  description="A Model Context Protocol (MCP) server that connects AI agents to Tenzir, generates data parsers, and creates OCSF mappings."
-  href="/changelog/mcp"
-  icon="setting"
-  color="pink"
-  meta="v0.4.4"
-/>
-
-<LinkCard
-  title="Tenzir Test"
-  description="An integration testing framework that discovers tests, runs them with managed fixtures, and validates output against baselines."
-  href="/changelog/tenzir-test"
-  icon="rocket"
-  color="green"
-  meta="v0.13.1"
-/>
-
-<LinkCard
-  title="Tenzir Changelog"
-  description="A changelog management framework that curates entries, ships release notes, and assembles public changelogs."
-  href="/changelog/changelog"
-  icon="open-book"
-  color="purple"
-  meta="v0.17.0"
-/>
-
-<LinkCard
-  title="Claude Marketplace"
-  description="A Claude Code plugin marketplace containing plugins that extend Claude's capabilities for working with the Tenzir ecosystem."
-  href="/changelog/claude-plugins"
-  icon="puzzle"
-  color="orange"
-  meta="v1.0.0"
-/>
-
-<LinkCard
-  title="Tree-sitter TQL"
-  description="A Tree-sitter grammar for the Tenzir Query Language (TQL) with bindings for Node.js, Python, Rust, Go, and Swift."
-  href="/changelog/tree-sitter-tql"
-  icon="sun"
-  color="yellow"
-  meta="v1.0.0"
-/>
-
----
-
-For general release announcements and deeper dives into selected features,
-check out our [blog](https://tenzir.com/blog) or join the conversation on
-our [Discord](https://tenzir.com/discord).
+The changelog is populated during CI builds. Run `pnpm sync:changelog` locally
+to fetch release notes from the [tenzir/news](https://github.com/tenzir/news)
+repository.
